title: Canadian Lentil Curry
description: A hearty and flavorful curry made with Canadian lentils, perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the onion, garlic, and ginger. Saute until the onion is translucent.
Add the lentils, curry powder, cumin powder, and salt. Cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add the tomato puree and vegetable broth. Stir well.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 30-40 minutes.
Check the lentils for tenderness. If they are not tender, continue to simmer for another 10-15 minutes.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the curry hot, garnished with chopped cilantro or scallions if desired.
